title: BMS Service Engineer-HVAC/Chillers - Up to $6500 -ALL WELCOME
description:
• Position : BMS Service Engineer-HVAC/Chillers
  • Working hours : Monday to Friday | 8.30am to 5.30pm
  • Location: Office in Boon Lay-Islandwide
  • Salary (commensurate with experience) : Up to $6500 Basic + $50 Transport allowance + $50 mobile + Minimum 2 months Variable Bonus (max up to 5 MONTHS BONUS) + 16 days Annual Leaves + Medical Benefits +Overtime
  • Duration : Permanent
  • Industry : Refrigerating, Air-conditioning & Ventilation Machinery - MNC

Main responsibilities :

  • Responsible for providing preventive maintenance service for BMS (Building Management System)
  • Carry out troubling shooting, analyzing and rectification of the system on time
  • Support client with system operation and recommendation for improvement
  • Data analyzing and determination of the system operation status
  • Response client’s request and attend the issue in short notice
  • Supervise subcontractor to carry out the work safely
  • Provide the assistance to colleague and mentoring actively
  • Ensure all works carried out in accordance with the specified quality and EHS standards
  • Prepare and submit quotations, including material, labor, and scope of works
  • Perform replacement/repair, fit out works/A&A for existing BMS site
  • Perform weekly standby on rotation schedule
  • Perform calibration and verification of BMS sensors annually
  • Provide sales support BMS service and site survey

Requirement:

  • Diploma/ Degree from a recognized technical institute
  • Hands on experience in BMS Control System, programming languages and logic gates
  • Familiar with digital fundamental
  • Knowledge on basic networking & ACMV system
  • ALL WEL

COME!

Email to joie@searchpersonnel.com.sg

Do visit www.facebook.com/search.personnel for more job listings and career tips!

***We DO NOT charge our candidates any referral fee nor bind them with any contract.***

Joie Chang

Deputy Consulting Director (APAC)

Reg no.: R2090601 | EA No: 13C6684

Thank you for your interest in this position. Our shortlisting period is 3 working days. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further consideration.

If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend that you continue your job search to maximize your opportunities. We wish you all the best and should we have any suitable roles that match your experiences/ qualifications/ preferences, we will reach out to you.

postedCompany.description:
SEARCH PERSONNEL PRIVATE LIMITED

 

Search Personnel is an established, leading and reputable recruitment company that brings effective services to individuals and organisations with a sense of urgency and commitment.


The thought behind Search Personnel is to deliver a specialized, high quality recruitment service.


With Search Personnel you can expect a level of quality and professionalism from experts who know recruitment and understand the market. With a team of experienced recruitment consultants, we can exploit into years of local recruitment experience and expertise. This enables us to bring the best roles and the best candidates together.


Our Services:

  • Executive Search (Headhunting)
  • Permanent Staffing
  • Payroll Processing Service
  • Contract Staffing
  • Temporary Staffing and Casual Workers
  • Foreign Recruitment (Overseas placements)

Awarded:
SME100 Awards 2020 - Singapore's Fast Moving Companies


Awarded:

  • Best Recruitment Portal – (Singapore) – Bronze in 2019
  • Best Staffing Firm – (Singapore) – Bronze in 2020
  • Best Mid-Management Recruitment Firm – (Singapore) – Bronze in 2020
  • Best Recruitment Firm – Mid-management roles RM8000 - RM15000 per month (Malaysia) – Gold in 2017 and Bronze in 2020
  • Best Recruitment Firm – Non-management roles under RM8000 per month (Malaysia) – Silver in 2018
  • Best Executive Search Firm – (Malaysia) – Bronze Award in 2019 and 2020

Voted by our valued clients and the public, HR Vendors of the Year Awards is one of Asia’s largest award shows dedicated to celebrating the achievements of organizations that do their best in serving the HR professionals.


We are not only providing recruitment services but also solutions to employers in talent management, from employee’s on-boarding, performance management, to retention.


Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Search Personnel Private Limited for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.
